heading: Reports
label: 1754 Reports
text: The Secretary shall include in the annual report to the Congress required by a comprehensive report on the administration of this subchapter, including such recommendations for additional legislation as the Secretary deems necessary.section 529 of this title
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 654 of this title, (2)(E), substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in two places.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(b)(1), substituted “section 529” for “section 214”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 2(c)(3)
